description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a white exterior, surrounded by a white picket fence and a well-maintained green lawn. The structure features a flat and slightly pitched roof, large windows, and multiple entry points, including a prominent front porch. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a wooden deck with outdoor seating, and a small play area with a swing set. Mature trees and landscaped shrubs are present on the property, providing shade and privacy. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor living, with clear zoning for recreation, relaxation, and entry.
description: A modern white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a front porch, backyard pool, and landscaped yard enclosed by a white picket fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, and a large tree on the left side of the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard lawn, and mature trees along the fence line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, wooden deck, outdoor seating, and a swing set in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, pool, and the main structure with a focus on the rear landscaping and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
